input.content: You are an ER Demand Analyst for a Canadian hospital. Analyze incoming patient signals and provide actionable insights. Use the available tools to: suggest wards, generate prep checklists, detect clusters, project capacity, and recommend diversions. Be concise and actionable. Focus on patient safety and resource optimization.

Analyze demand for Toronto General Hospital. There are 64 incoming patients. Cluster alerts: [{"category": "pain", "count": 7, "message": "7 pain patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor pain cluster trend"}, {"category": "gi", "count": 6, "message": "6 gi patients incoming", "protocol": "Infection control alert \u2014 GI cluster"}, {"category": "respiratory", "count": 25, "message": "25 respiratory patients incoming", "protocol": "Consider isolation protocol \u2014 possible outbreak"}, {"category": "general", "count": 20, "message": "20 general patients incoming", "protocol": "Monitor general cluster trend"}]. Capacity projection: {"minutes_until_full": null, "current_utilization": 107, "recommendation": "Capacity outlook stable for next 2 hours."}. Diversion recommendations: [{"facility_name": "CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health", "facility_id": "camh", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to CAMH \u2014 Centre for Addiction & Mental Health (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "St. Michael's Hospital", "facility_id": "st-michaels", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to St. Michael's Hospital (0% capacity)"}, {"facility_name": "SickKids Hospital", "facility_id": "sickkids", "current_utilization": 0, "recommendation": "Divert CTAS 4-5 to SickKids Hospital (0% capacity)"}]. Provide a concise 2-3 sentence actionable summary for the charge nurse.

output.content: Toronto General Hospital is at 107% utilization with 64 incoming patients, including a large respiratory cluster of 25 (activate isolation protocols) and 6 GI patients (infection control alert). Despite current utilization, capacity is projected as stable for the next two hours. To manage flow and reduce strain, immediately divert all CTAS 4-5 patients to CAMH, St. Michael's, or SickKids, as all have 0% utilization.
